---
title: "Microwave-assisted digestion for multi-elemental determination in beans, basil, and mint by ICP OES and flame photometry: An eco-friendly alternative"
date: 2025-07-01
author:
  - name: Da Silva, Iago J.S.
  - name: Da Silva, Micherlane M.
  - name: Da Silva, Ryan G.M.F.
  - name: De França, Elvis J.
  - name: Da Silva, Maria J.
  - name: Kato, Mario T.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Food Chemistry"
  volume: 481
  doi: "10.1016/j.foodchem.2025.143970"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Microwave-assisted digestion for multi-elemental determination in beans, basil, and mint by ICP OES and flame photometry: An eco-friendly alternative</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
